last_prompt: Research and design a `wreck-it graph` sub-command that reads a task file and exports the dependency graph in Mermaid flowchart and/or GraphViz DOT format. Review the existing CLI structure in cli/src/cli.rs (clap commands) and the Task type. Design: (1) a new `graph` subcommand with flags `--task-file`, `--format <mermaid|dot>`, and `--output <file>` (default stdout), (2) the Mermaid flowchart syntax for representing task nodes (id + role) and directed edges (depends_on relationships), coloured by status (pending=gray, completed=green, failed=red). No new dependencies should be needed since graph generation is pure string formatting.
